## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes (zero runtime deps; tests use a fake `agy`, no auth/network needed)
- [ ] Added/updated a test when behavior changed
- [ ] If the `agy` contract changed (flags, log format, quota behavior), updated **both**
      `docs/antigravity-cli-reference.md` and `scripts/lib/agy.mjs`
- [ ] Docs/README/CHANGELOG updated if user-facing
